name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: DID YOU SEE: Court Packing Is HERE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
This is not a drill. Supreme Court majority GONE? PeterThis is HUGE, and YOU need to know this.This past week in the Judiciary Committee, I watched as the liberals' long-rumored **[PACK THE COURT](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) **bill became real. They want to END the conservative majority on the court by increasing the justices from nine (currently) to 13, adding four seats **for Joe Biden and the liberal Senate to confirm! ****Pro-Life Values. The 2nd Amendment. Religious Freedom. What else could be at risk under a permanent liberal majority?** And who do you think their four liberal LIFETIME appointments to the court would be? [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [[ JOIN FITZ ] - Defend the Supreme Court!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) **Ranking Member Jim Jordan and I** are going to fight this in the Judiciary Committee with every ounce of fight we have. We've already gotten started, and we won't rest until this horrible idea is DEAD. The radical left is going to be watching this debate closely, and they're going to COME AFTER Those of us who are brave enough to stand up and fight. I'm going to need to rely on friends and supporters like you to back me up! **And we need to take back the House in 2022, so we can stop ideas like this from coming back again and again! **Appointing and confirming **THREE** Supreme Court Justices is the defining legacy of President Trump and our Republican Majority. The liberals could undo it and appoint **FOUR** new justices in one fell swoop if this plan passes.That's how big this moment is.**And that's how important it is that you STEP UP and help me stop this![Please, click here ASAP to join me!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)**-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-d/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mdibtd-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-h) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-mdibtd-ahkdjtlkr-k/)
---

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Obey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Senator Josh Hawley <Anthony@usafreedomfighters.org>
Date: Apr 15, 2021 at 9:05:31 AM
Subject: Obey
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "OBEY") Peter, Every time I see a new liberal policy – no matter what the stated purpose is – there is always a single underlying aim: control. Now, though, their drive to control every aspect of your life has gone into overdrive. **[I am doing all I can in the U.S. Senate to stop them, but I need your help.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "I am doing all I can in the U.S. Senate to
stop them, but I need your help.")** Liberals in government now believe that they know better than you on literally every aspect of your life:
* When you can leave your home,
* When, or even if, you can work,
* When you can own a gun, even though this right is explicitly guaranteed in the Bill of Rights,
* When your children will go to school, and what they will be taught about sex
* The very words you will be allowed to say, lest you offend anyone, and
* How you can worship.

The Founding Fathers of this nation were trying to escape a tyrannical government that controlled their lives. **THAT WAS THE POINT OF THE CONSTITUTION – _IT WAS A LIMIT ON GOVERNMENT POWER_ , NOT THE BLANK CHECK LIBERALS THINK.** I’m serving in the U.S. Senate as a voice for people who want the Constitution upheld, not for people who want to use government to control your life. **[If you stand with me on these principles, then please support my efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "If
you stand with me on these principles, then please support my efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom today!")** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
The Democrats in power have no boundaries, no sense of decency – they will do anything or say anything to control every decision you make.
**As you can imagine, I am on their hit list because I refuse to stop fighting.**
Joe Biden himself said that I should be “flat out beaten,” and accused me of being a “Nazi” for doing my job, yet he is the one seeking to steal our liberty and will bend rules, like the filibuster, to remove any obstacle in their quest to control your life.
**[If you still believe that principles of our Constitution are worth fighting for, then I need you to join me by making a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me send a strong message to the liberal elites who are telling us to sit down.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154098:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "If you still believe that principles of our Constitution are
worth fighting for, then I need you to join me by making a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me send a strong message to the
liberal elites who are telling us to sit down.")**
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
**I will never let them trample on our Constitutional Rights—I owe that much to you, my family, and to God.**
**[Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and
preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.")**
Sincerely,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154098:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57154097:66uR-tuRN:m:1:3103520637:DB3FAB6A3DCB528F6AD5D3508C664A01:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Biden created the Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Senator Josh Hawley <Anthony@usafreedomfighters.org>
Date: Mar 21, 2021 at 4:35:23 PM
Subject: Biden created the Crisis
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "Crisis on the Southern border") Peter, President Trump tried to warn us – Joe Biden is not fit to be President. He doesn’t have what it takes. Nothing is making that clearer to the American people than the crisis on the Southern border. Joe Biden’s ridiculous policies started on Day One of his presidency and they have already created a massive humanitarian crisis on our Southern border, **and he has responded by doing...NOTHING.** The media will never tell the truth about Joe Biden – it is up to us. And on March 31st, you and I are going to tell one heck of a jaw-dropping surprise. **I will be filing the first FEC financial report I have filed since I stood up for the integrity of our nation’s election and the left began their attempts to cancel me.** **[The establishment predicted it would be the end of my political career – but if you make your donation before this deadline, we will show them that our movement is stronger and ready to keep the flame of liberty alive.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "The establishment predicted it would be the end of my political career – but if you make your donation before this deadline, we will show
them that our movement is stronger and ready to keep the flame of liberty alive.")** **[DO AS YOU ARE TOLD OR YOU WILL BE PUNISHED. Sadly, too many in DC have capitulated to their demands – too afraid to stand with me—but I am counting on you to show them that Americans nationwide are tired of their power grabs and we’re fighting back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "DO AS
YOU ARE TOLD OR YOU WILL BE PUNISHED. Sadly, too many in DC have capitulated to their demands – too afraid to stand with me—but I am
counting on you to show them that Americans nationwide are tired of their power grabs and we’re fighting back.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "Josh Hawley") | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
I’ll make no apologies for standing up for the foundation of our democracy, and I will keep standing against the Biden Administration’s wayward policies that undermine our national security.
**[With your donation of $25, $50, $100 or more before the critical deadline on March 31, we will shock the left – they won’t be able to ignore us any longer.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "With your donation of $25, $50, $100 or more before the critical
deadline on March 31, we will shock the left – they won’t be able to ignore us any longer.")**
The fight may be long, but our nation is worth fighting for, and I refuse to give up. Will you stand with me in this new frontier for freedom?
For our Future,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024769:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57024768:6t4VFau9N:m:1:3103520637:EF0F19B307E65469880329AA138095AD:r "STAND WITH
JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: My Tucker Carlson Interview
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Josh Hawley <Anthony@usafreedomfighters.org>
Date: Mar 5, 2021 at 10:41:36 PM
Subject: My Tucker Carlson Interview
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "Biden") Peter, No matter how many times Joe Biden calls for “unity,” it is clear that Democrats have no interest in unity – it is clear they will never stop trying to punish me for refusing to sit down and do as they tell me. If you are happy to see Democrats use the full force of the United States government to destroy anyone who disagrees with them, then you can stop reading now – _I only want to talk to patriots._ I’m serving in the U.S. Senate as a voice for people who want the Constitution upheld, not for people who want to use government to promote partisan grudges or progressive payoffs. **[If you stand with me on these principles, then please support my efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "If you stand with me on these principles, then please support my
efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom today!")** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
The Democrats in power have no boundaries, no sense of decency – they only know to use their power to hurt anyone who doesn’t agree with them. Donald Trump isn’t the only person they are going after – I am also on their hit list because I refused to back down.
**_Joe Scarborough called me “unfit” and accused me of “committing treason.”_**
Joe Biden himself said that I should be “flat out beaten,” and accused me of being a “Nazi” for raising questions in a format prescribed by the laws of the United States, granted by our Constitution.
This is the same behavior that gets conservatives like actress Gina Carano fired. **_I think it is time for us to start canceling Democrats at the polls._**
They are coming after you and me, and it will continue until we hold them accountable for their and hate-filled behavior. I need your help to fight off the Democrats, and to stop them from using our government to ruin the lives of private citizens.
**[If you still believe that principles matter in our government, then I need you to join me by making a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me send a strong message to the liberal elites who are telling us to sit down and do as we are told.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923746:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "If you still believe that
principles matter in our government, then I need you to join me by making a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me send a
strong message to the liberal elites who are telling us to sit down and do as we are told.")**
Just the other night, I was on Fox News with Tucker Carlson to talk more about this, and I hope you can watch this important interview.
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "Fox Interview")
**_Like I told Tucker, I will NOT back down_** no matter how many times the “woke” media and special interests tell me to shut up and ignore the truth.
**[If you have had enough of the radical left punishing anyone who dares to disagree, then I need to know you are with me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "If you have had enough of the radical left punishing anyone who
dares to disagree, then I need to know you are with me.")**
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
**I’ll make no apologies for standing up for President Trump or any other private citizen who is targeted for cancellation. I will never let them trample on our Constitutional Rights—I owe that much to you, my family, and to God.**
**[Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and
preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.")**
Sincerely,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923746:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "Josh
Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56923745:609rHWuNl:m:1:3103520637:4CC3AD3441CAFD3B0B4D2B0D15F78840:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

"Fox Interview" Like I told Tucker, I will NOT back down no matter how many times the “woke” media and special interests tell me to shut up and ignore the truth. "If you have had enough of the radical left punishing anyone who dares to disagree, then I need to know you are with me." | "STAND WITH JOSH" I’ll make no apologies for standing up for President Trump or any other private citizen who is targeted for cancellation. I will never let them trample on our Constitutional Rights—I owe that much to you, my family, and to God. "Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and preserving our values for generations of Americans to come." Sincerely, "Josh Hawley" Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri | "STAND WITH JOSH" | PAID FOR BY HAWLEY FOR SENATE Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Kelly Loeffler & the Chinese Communist Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Doug Collins <Anthony@usafreedomfighters.org>
Date: Oct 30, 2020 at 9:04:34 AM
Subject: Kelly Loeffler & the Chinese Communist Party
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Kelly Loeffler & the Chinese Communist Party
---
| [ ](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r) Peter, _**What I’m about to show to you sounds absolutely ridiculous...**_ It’s almost hard to believe that a sitting Senator from Georgia _**\-- or any state --**_ would pay such shocking tributes to the Chinese Communist Party and its bloodthirsty founder, Mao Tse-Tung. _**But then again, this isn’t the first time Kelly Loeffler has left conservatives scratching their heads, trying to make sense of her actions.**_ _**[Our latest ad is just 30-seconds, but I promise you it packs a punch!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r)**_ [ ](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r) **First, let me briefly remind everyone who Mao Tse-Tung is:** ❌ Mao founded the Chinese Communist Party ❌ Mao’s brutal socialist policies -- _like the Great Leap Forward_ \-- collectivized China’s agriculture and led to the worst famine in human history ❌ Mao also enacted a widespread system of forced labor camps -- _similar to the Soviet gulag_ \-- killing millions Altogether, Mao is responsible for an estimated **65 MILLION** deaths, more than Adolf Hitler and Joseph Stalin; and yet, inexplicably, Kelly Loeffler once _**prominently displayed**_ a $60,000 portrait of Mao in her Buckhead mansion. **When confronted about her disgusting display of the most barbaric mass murderer of the 20th century, clearly caught off-guard, Kelly stammered for a few moments before dodging the question entirely.** _**When journalists followed up with her campaign for a comment, her team had the GALL to claim the image was photoshopped!**_ _**[She LIED and we have the evidence to prove it...](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r)**_ [ ](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r) _**As an isolated event, this is downright disturbing...**_ But when you begin to take into account all of Kelly’s other tributes to the Chinese Communist Party, it becomes a much, much darker story. _**[Kelly and her husband also brazenly chose to PLANT A CHINESE FLAG at their New York Stock Exchange!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r)**_ <[ ](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r) And despite all of Kelly’s political posturing and repeated calls to _**“hold China accountable”**_ for its role in the spread of the coronavirus, she **REFUSES** to delist the Chinese Communist Party owned companies that are currently being traded on her exchange. We **CANNOT** let unsuspecting Georgians support someone with such an affinity for a brutal dictator, tyrannical political party, and poisonous ideology. Kelly Loeffler not only props up the Chinese Communist Party, she accepts their money AND pays homage to their founder with a portrait in HER HOME! We need EVERY Georgia conservative to share this video FAR & WIDE! And if you can, please donate to help us keep this ad on the air from now through Election Day:
_**[https://secure.anedot.com/collins-for-senate/35738](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r)**_ Georgians deserve to know the truth about Kelly Loeffler. Will you help us get the truth out? Thank you, [ ](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56250904:J1CiaqboN:m:1:3103520637:41FF3F53F42D8B91CD16AFF9760CA730:r) Doug Collins **PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC.**
---

Loeffler offered Trump $50 million to sink her challenger
---
| [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "Trump and Doug") Peter, I was proud to stand with Doug Collins at his recent Trump Defenders rally in Georgia. In the Trump movement, we need fighters, and Doug is a real fighter. **Doug is an Iraq War veteran, current Air Force Reserve chaplain, and former pastor.** Doug Collins is the President’s “preferred pick” for this Senate seat because he is one of his top defenders in Congress. He took on Pelosi, Schiff, and the rest of the anti-Trump Left during the sham impeachment. It’s not enough for us to just re-elect President Trump this November. He needs the right team in place to capitalize on this opportunity and get us back to the core principles of our country. **[Please contribute to Doug’s conservative campaign.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "Please contribute to Doug’s conservative campaign.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "Watch") **_Doug is running against a total RINO: Kelly Loeffler._** Let’s examine her record: Donated her WNBA team’s ticket sales to Planned Parenthood
Donated to Hillary Clinton, Maxine Waters, and Chris Dodd
Partnered with Michael Bloomberg’s gun-grabbing organization You may also know Kelly Loeffler as the **“Pandemic Profiteer”** who sold millions of dollars worth of stocks after a private Senate Health Committee briefing on the Coronavirus in January. **Kelly _also_ tried to offer donations to the Trump campaign to push Doug Collins out of the race. Fortunately, this President cannot be bought, and neither can this Senate seat!** **[If you’ve had enough of these swampy dealings, I need you to give a generous donation to my friend, Doug Collins.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "If
you’ve had enough of these swampy dealings, I need you to give a generous donation to my friend, Doug Collins.")** **[Let’s help send one of President Trump’s top defenders to fight for him in the U.S. Senate!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "Let’s help send one of President
Trump’s top defenders to fight for him in the U.S. Senate!")** | | [DONATE NOW >>>](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "DONATE NOW")
---
Thank you,

Rep. Matt Gaetz
P.S. Doug Collins is in a tight race despite being **outspent 52-to-1** by his opponent! Let’s give Doug the resources he needs to fight back and defeat the D.C. Swamp this November. **[Donate any amount you can before it’s too late.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56239537:Jb2PtSbCN:m:1:3103520637:B2843EA667D1821FCE85700870C92A51:r "Donate any amount you can before

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: The 1 Seat Americans must Flip
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CUMMINGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Defeat AOC <Anthony@usafreedomfighters.org>
Date: Oct 22, 2020 at 10:01:05 AM
Subject: The 1 Seat Americans must Flip
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

The 1 Seat Americans must Flip
---
| [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192356:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "AOC") Peter, Can you think of four more scary words than **_Senator Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez?_** Well...if you don’t help me RIGHT NOW, it won’t be long until Congresswoman AOC becomes **_Senator_ AOC!** My name is John Cummings and I’m the Republican nominee running against AOC, and seeking to return her to private life. Unlike AOC, I love America. I’m a former NYPD cop and public-school teacher who is running for Congress to improve the lives of Americans, especially in my community, and not to feed my own personal political ego. Even President Trump has predicted AOC will challenge...and DEFEAT...Chuck Schumer in the 2022 Election! The prospect of removing Chuck Schumer from the Senate is appealing, but if you think Chuck Schumer is bad, just imagine what Senator AOC would look like! **[For the sake of our nation, will you help me retire AOC in less than 3 weeks by making a contribution today of $250, $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can afford?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192356:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "For the sake of our nation, will you help me
retire AOC in less than 3 weeks by making a contribution today of $250, $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can afford?")** AOC’s vision of our great nation is worse than Hillary Clinton’s. It is worse than Barack Obama’s and unless we defeat her NOW, there’s no stopping her. **You must look at this time in our history, like the 2006 Democrat Convention, where Barack Obama’s speech propelled him to the White House. You and I have the chance to stop AOC skyrocketing political career—we cannot delay.** While “The Squad” may be jubilant at this future prospect, this would be an _absolute disaster_ for you, me, and most importantly...for America. Imagine our great nation with Senator AOC legislation like:
* The job-killing “New Green Deal;”
* Defunding America’s law enforcement;
* Repealing the Second Amendment;
* Alienating Israel, one of America’s greatest allies, and
* Influencing a possible President Biden EVEN FURTHER TO THE LEFT

**That’s why I’m turning to YOU, as a freedom-loving, patriotic American.** Right now, AOC is running for re-election to the U.S. House. She has raised _millions of_ dollars for her current reelection campaign... over **_$12,000,000 since she took office!_** At cocktail parties from Manhattan to San Francisco, these liberal elites have opened up their wallets to ensure AOC is re-elected and does what Nancy Pelosi has failed to provide them. Make no mistake—AOC looks at the U.S. House as merely a steppingstone to higher office and that’s why we need to end her political career next month. | | [_DEFEAT AOC_](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192356:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "DEFEAT AOC!")
---
I can’t match AOC’s fundraising dollar for dollar, but I have something she will never have—YOU and other freedom-loving Americans who reject AOC’s warped vision of America. Together, if we stand up and fight for freedom, we will win!
**[Will you help me DEFEAT AOC and her radical, socialist agenda by making a contribution today of $250, $100, $50, $25, or any amount you can afford?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192356:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "Will you help me DEFEAT AOC and her radical, socialist agenda by making a contribution today of $250, $100, $50, $25, or any amount you can
afford?")**
_A victory for me is a victory for ALL Americans!_
America’s future is bright and I will work to ensure the flame of freedom continues to burn if I’m elected to Congress. America wins if AOC loses, and I’m hoping I can count on your support to make this goal a reality.
Thank you in advance for your support!
God Bless our great country,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192356:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "John
Cummings")
John Cummings
Former NYPD Officer
Republican for Congress
**P.S.** With your help, we can send a shot across the bow of America’s Left and send a strong and unmistakable message that AOC’s vision of America is not ours! **Please ACT NOW.[Your contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 will make a HUGE difference in this race and will send AOC PACKING!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192357:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "Your contribution of $250, $100, $50,
or even $25 will make a HUGE difference in this race and will send AOC PACKING!")**
| [_DEFEAT AOC_](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/56192356:691BeFbtN:m:1:3103520637:6FA71744166917C4D2BFB71042E217BB:r "DEFEAT AOC!")
---
| **PAID FOR BY CUMMINGS FOR CONGRESS**
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: throw away your masks and burn your ‘vaccine passport’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57196024:6RVPA_uNy:m:1:3206719985:E231E4A3BC904F2D48B20173445C5DD2:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57196025:6RVPA_uNy:m:1:3206719985:E231E4A3BC904F2D48B20173445C5DD2:r) | |
---
Peter,

The left has gone completely COVID crazy.

They want government-enforced shutdowns, mask mandates, school closures, forced vaccines, and now they're talking about a COVID vaccine passport.

It's absolutely unconstitutional - not to mention, it's absurd.
[**I AGREE: CHIP IN NOW TO STAND UP >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57196026:6RVPA_uNy:m:1:3206719985:E231E4A3BC904F2D48B20173445C5DD2:r)
A Democrat politician famously said, _" never let a crisis go to waste."_ Boy, did this pandemic really see them put their shoulder into that old axiom.

Throughout the COVID crisis, these radicals have embraced theatrics, abandoned science, and the longer it goes on, the more they double down.

**The newest power grab comes in the form of an alleged "Vaccine Passport" which would determine whether or not you're "ALLOWED" to engage in your everyday life.**

_Want to go to the store? Show your vaccine card._

Want to go to a restaurant or concert? Did you tell the government what vaccines you've had?

_Want to travel? VACCINE PAPERS PLEASE._

This is the slippery slope I warned about and it's exactly what I'm fighting to defeat in Washington. Will you chip in to join the fight today?

Peter, this passport idea from these hypocrites in Washington is just completely unacceptable.

Let's not forget: these are the same people who are boycotting states like Georgia for implementing common-sense policies like voter ID.

Let me tell you something... if you think voter ID is racist, but the vaccine passport is just fine, you need some serious help thinking through public policy.

**I will never be in favor of this COVID hysteria and I will never support a COVID passport.[JOIN ME: CHIP IN NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57196026:6RVPA_uNy:m:1:3206719985:E231E4A3BC904F2D48B20173445C5DD2:r)**

It's time to say enough is enough.

I urge everyone to get the vaccine if you need or want it. And then I urge everyone in America to throw away their masks, demand their schools be open, and burn your vaccine passport if they try to give it to you.

**If you're with me, please chip in today to join the fight against the vaccine passport powergrab.**
[**DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57196026:6RVPA_uNy:m:1:3206719985:E231E4A3BC904F2D48B20173445C5DD2:r)

Rand Paul

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of April 19th: Stop Democrats from packing the court!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
Now that we know that the Democrats in Congress are introducing legislation to increase the size of the Supreme Court from 9 Justices to 13, it is more important than ever to protect the filibuster.

The filibuster is everything. As a result, it is imperative that you help us educate people about it and help them take action.

Because the filibuster seems arcane and boring-sounding, the best way to show people the importance of the filibuster, is to watch Mr. Smith Goes to Washington and use the how-to guide we’ve created to take action.

This is the only action item this week! Sign up, watch the movie, and complete the action items in the how-to guide!

https://tpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com/documents/Protect_Filibuster_How_To_Guide.pdf

--------------------------------------------

**** Protect the Filibuster: Sign up to Host a Mr. Smith Goes to Washington House Party

Sign up to watch Mr. Smith Goes to Washington with friends and neighbors, or on your own/with members of your household (if you can’t have guests over) any time between April 22 – April 25. After the movie, there will be a discussion, action items, and then homework for later.

While the filibuster may seem arcane and unimportant, it is all that stands in the way of the most radical, extremist, communist bills passing – which Joe Biden will sign – and the corruption of the Supreme Court, so that SCOTUS would uphold all challenges to these laws. And, of course, the Democrats are also introducing a bill for statehood for D.C., which would be challenged in court because it is blatantly unconstitutional. But if SCOTUS is increased to 13 Justices, all of whom would be the most radical justices we’ve ever seen, SCOTUS will rule in favor of statehood, and that’s two more hardcore, left-wing Senators in the Senate.

Note: if you can’t watch the movie between the dates listed above, feel free to schedule it for a date that works for you, or if you can’t hold it at your house, but you know someone who could, please go ahead and ask them to host! Just be sure to sign up today, so we know how many people will be watching and completing the action items.

SIGN UP TO PROTECT THE FILIBUSTER: https://www.teapartypatriots.org/protectfilibuster/

On the landing page, you can download a host how-to guide with all of the information you’ll need, a detailed host checklist, and print outs for your guests.

One more note: if you live in a blue state with Democrat Senators, it still matters to educate voters and call your Senators! We need to show all of them that even their constituents oppose getting rid of the filibuster.

--------------------------------------------

The Senate filibuster stands as a bulwark against the Democrats' radical agenda and that's why they are so intent on destroying it, like everything that stands in the way of their radical agenda.

The importance of protecting the filibuster can be seen most clearly in our fight against court packing...

Last week, congressional Democrats introduced legislation to pack the Supreme Court — adding 4 additional justices, bringing the total number of justices to 13.

The Senate filibuster stops their radical plan right in its tracks. They don't have the votes and they know it. However, were they to kill the filibuster, like they want to, they would be able to pass such radical legislation on the basis of a simple partisan majority.

We must stand strong in opposition to getting rid of the Senate filibuster, it serves as a safeguard for the foundation of our very system of government.

--------------------------------------------

**** Check out The Red, White, & Blueprint

Some of our local coordinators in California told us about a massive effort to take on the oppressive tyrants at their county level. Not only are they doing this, but they are documenting the whole effort in a documentary series that you can watch for free. Their message for the rest of us, particularly those of us that live in areas where the local government behaves as tyrannically as the Biden administration, is that we can and should fight locally, and they have a blueprint that others can follow. Go to theredwhiteandblueprint.com, watch the trailer, and sign up to watch the first episode for free.

--------------------------------------------

Joe Biden had a jammed-packed week, last week, of attacking fundamental American institutions with executive overreach. On top of creating a commission to push Democrats' radical plan to pack the Supreme Court, he also took sweeping executive action to push gun control.

Which is ironic, seeing as how his son Hunter Biden was recently exposed for having lied on a federal background check to illegally purchase a firearm.

Perhaps Joe Biden's new ATF nominee David Chipman, who Tucker Carlson described as a "conspiracy nut," will arrest Hunter...

I mean, Chipman does in-fact believe that people who lie on background checks should be arrested, so if confirmed, would he pursue charges against the President's son?

Only time will tell; but in the meantime, Joe Biden will continue to try to erode our civil liberties through executive action, all the while ensuring the rules don't apply to his family or powerful friends.

The swamp is back.

--------------------------------------------

**** Freeroots Campaigns – fast, easy activism!

Freeroots is an online activism portal, created by one of our allies, that allows you to take action in about thirty seconds. It is so, so easy and fast! Visit the following campaigns and share them online!

- Save the filibuster: https://freeroots.com/go/fight-4-filibuster
- Corporations in Georgia must stop caving to the left: https://freeroots.com/go/protect-fair-elections-in-georgia
- Stay Out of Politics, Facebook and Twitter!: https://freeroots.com/go/stayoutofpolitics-fb-tw
- Tell Amazon to STOP Funding Black Lives Matter: https://freeroots.com/go/tell-amazon-to-stop-funding-black-lives-matter

--------------------------------------------

The only seemingly good news to come out of last week is that Democrats won't be able to ram their radical legislative agenda through Congress. Activism worked.

After receiving immense pressure from the right, Moderate Democrat Joe Manchin crushed Democrats' dreams for "progressive" "transformational" change in one move, when he wrote an op-ed titled:

"I will not vote to eliminate or weaken the filibuster"

https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/joe-manchin-filibuster-vote/2021/04/07/cdbd53c6-97da-11eb-a6d0-13d207aadb78_story.html

Eliminating the filibuster was key for radical progressives to even have a prayer's chance of passing their radical agenda. Now, those dreams have been killed and, to that, we say good.

We must keep the pressure up; while we may not have the majority in Congress currently, a loud minority can keep the radicals relatively in check. Our activism paid off and we thank you for your help in this vital fight.

--------------------------------------------

**** Ongoing Action Items

Sign up for the Election Integrity working group.
https://forms.gle/g4L55abqpgqUH8PG8

Sign up for the Immigration working group.
https://forms.gle/2H9LhusgM5dG9xYr6

The House press gallery is trying to block The Epoch Times from renewing their press pass. Please sign our petition calling on the press gallery to reinstate their press pass!
https://epochtimes.act.teapartypatriots.org/

Go to our website and sign onto the letter opposing earmarks. Then, ask others to do the same on social media or via email.
https://www.teapartypatriots.org/stop-the-currency-of-corruption/

--------------------------------------------

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
_________________________________________

Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe: https://my.teapartypatriots.org/communication-preferences/?id=T18o9w0eujKok8mQAQ

PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
https://www.teapartypatriots.org/citizensfund

2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Maxine Waters Expelled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
TELL NANCY PELOSI: EXPEL MAXINE WATERS! SIGN YOUR PETITION

Dear Peter -- Its time to make the
Democrats live by their own rules.
Maxine Waters is a danger to America and
should be EXPELLED after years of inciting violence. . .

Maxine Waters encouraged BLM/Antifa rioters
and terrorists to be more "confrontational" in the streets.
She even threatened a jury, demanding a
guilty verdict against Chauvin!
And if she doesn't get what she wants? Maxine
Waters wants the city to burn.
Maxine Waters' actions directly led to a
drive-by shooting on National Guardsmen in Minnesota!
What did Nancy Pelosi do? She REFUSED to
condemn Maxine Waters and claimed Maxine doesn't "need to
apologize."
This is the time for Republicans to get tough
and hold Democrats in Congress accountable for their hate-America
violent rhetoric.
That's why I'm introducing a resolution to
EXPEL Maxine Waters from Congress!

Sign your petition and urge your elected
officials to join my resolution!
For years, Maxine Waters has incited
BLM/Antifa violence and riots.
And for four straight years, she was a top
lieutenant to Nancy Pelosi in their witch-hunt impeachment sham
against President Trump.
It's time Republicans fight back and let
these hate-America Democrats like Maxine Waters know: enough is
enough! You will not keep America hostage.

TELL NANCY PELOSI: EXPEL MAXINE WATERS! SIGN
YOUR PETITION

Maxine Waters must be expelled from Congress!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

body:
President Trump needs to know if you stand with him, %%First Name%%.

Friend,

President Trump endorsed Senator Ron Johnson for U.S. Senate.

As of this morning, we still need 50 more Patriots to [**SIGN HERE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F1Cpc0aoSCscPg8dWv5jyK6_WCa41ro8LblXwkSuqGuSjXJYPoTJdvgTMb3l8vbsrtmuYJvhoTPBEbLB3LEM_9cTL-VlsURhMHku2HagREoyUOt3uiC4GJwzA9a0GqFjl8S1sU-8WztbZQ5TEYDTWCnfGpl235OAzXSyUjWtL1miMd5DCYwIqHgj18J30eDpIYapF1tLLjeddf9gPsVEqD4DaGSpOCeUE-ifo3523bfYgPKjW3hTAOhUnnPblkSfLJcKWyXMVAhj-riiCoJ7kaDcXmm-aAktU2bTDhRWB3Asp4yLz8LP7jBSkR0QsjEVLVOh8xDJn9lmDUX4J_Zl6SAlb6_3Vk8SphoUYkoWhA7Sk75Ls2PkRCV7RQS_5tXL3MPzONzeovOsXLhPL8t6atuc6FLbVz36Jo9PYapYNYE=&c=cS0IM60odxtjOTEXKzXprPp5rEIIo3Zl9hgIfEBKCcdMCnUxGDtqsQ==&ch=EtAdFAfSRKbXeFv2JdwX6DC0W7ZMt320XIkSWxKHk_zymCpTF2ixrw==) and JOIN President Trump's endorsement of Senator Johnson.
**[**SIGN HERE TO JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP 'S ENDORSEMENT >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F1Cpc0aoSCscPg8dWv5jyK6_WCa41ro8LblXwkSuqGuSjXJYPoTJdvgTMb3l8vbsrtmuYJvhoTPBEbLB3LEM_9cTL-VlsURhMHku2HagREoyUOt3uiC4GJwzA9a0GqFjl8S1sU-8WztbZQ5TEYDTWCnfGpl235OAzXSyUjWtL1miMd5DCYwIqHgj18J30eDpIYapF1tLLjeddf9gPsVEqD4DaGSpOCeUE-ifo3523bfYgPKjW3hTAOhUnnPblkSfLJcKWyXMVAhj-riiCoJ7kaDcXmm-aAktU2bTDhRWB3Asp4yLz8LP7jBSkR0QsjEVLVOh8xDJn9lmDUX4J_Zl6SAlb6_3Vk8SphoUYkoWhA7Sk75Ls2PkRCV7RQS_5tXL3MPzONzeovOsXLhPL8t6atuc6FLbVz36Jo9PYapYNYE=&c=cS0IM60odxtjOTEXKzXprPp5rEIIo3Zl9hgIfEBKCcdMCnUxGDtqsQ==&ch=EtAdFAfSRKbXeFv2JdwX6DC0W7ZMt320XIkSWxKHk_zymCpTF2ixrw==)**
---

President Trump needs to know if you stand with him, Friend. At 10 P.M., we will send a list of supporters to President Trump to show him that Conservatives stand with him and Ron Johnson. Your signature is CRUCIAL to showing the Left that we still support him!
**[**SIGN HERE TO JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP 'S ENDORSEMENT >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F1Cpc0aoSCscPg8dWv5jyK6_WCa41ro8LblXwkSuqGuSjXJYPoTJdvgTMb3l8vbsrtmuYJvhoTPBEbLB3LEM_9cTL-VlsURhMHku2HagREoyUOt3uiC4GJwzA9a0GqFjl8S1sU-8WztbZQ5TEYDTWCnfGpl235OAzXSyUjWtL1miMd5DCYwIqHgj18J30eDpIYapF1tLLjeddf9gPsVEqD4DaGSpOCeUE-ifo3523bfYgPKjW3hTAOhUnnPblkSfLJcKWyXMVAhj-riiCoJ7kaDcXmm-aAktU2bTDhRWB3Asp4yLz8LP7jBSkR0QsjEVLVOh8xDJn9lmDUX4J_Zl6SAlb6_3Vk8SphoUYkoWhA7Sk75Ls2PkRCV7RQS_5tXL3MPzONzeovOsXLhPL8t6atuc6FLbVz36Jo9PYapYNYE=&c=cS0IM60odxtjOTEXKzXprPp5rEIIo3Zl9hgIfEBKCcdMCnUxGDtqsQ==&ch=EtAdFAfSRKbXeFv2JdwX6DC0W7ZMt320XIkSWxKHk_zymCpTF2ixrw==)**
---

Read President Trump's statement here:

_" Even though he has not announced that he is running, and I certainly hope he does, I am giving my Complete and Total Endorsement to Senator Ron Johnson of Wisconsin. He is brave, he is bold, he loves our Country, our Military, and our Vets. He will protect our Second Amendment, and everything else we stand for. It is the kind of courage we need in the U.S. Senate. He has no idea how popular he is. Run, Ron, Run!"_

name: Nancy Mace
subject: re: my first 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
I know there’s a lot that Congress needs to tackle — and I’m determined to stay on track, roll up my sleeves, and get down to business. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=f32fe13685894a72b593735755478bb7&_e=zTo-5D2YvdbDPbU5VQY69y6GwA0B75l2KB3Goh0IGy2rZ5dSguibtl0W06JGu9kG_gfCuSjUP5bxL9bv8ye-lRrYjhkPTktKPzEuaJw6GaXi7WhjKZIy-Itz1mMqwjGr29gDr9hIK3OXypHfXnQaWeRAu6UAOIndf9EN_pH-O0Pfcvb43D2T28P8NaNmP4XlT77J92Tn775rCAGYbGx4KwG6tbv_nmu6nShINOuLfGSKGpVWzRmz8TovrzXrdouSB2kkvn8bhYBKjvfd8lqWq7gozH4GBJ3nZb7vzfylvx22HnFkAnjIKOp-d2QZa5aX6VMesc3TG_gu1aik2BJi7RariCv7pJwUmVghkH0-zLL0XuT7wnsPFgKorLW7pK6AHBNLQZYjO5FKnSE9vcSxsJy7jlF9VyTbuXRZM8PVUKFheN7qY0-cpmQXOb8No7eZkdDZLgMNUZ4dVmKSzR8lpBoWdmD-NiEBW4VhAR0JsyM%3D) Hey friend — it’s Nancy. Just yesterday, we reached an important milestone: I’ve officially served 100 days in Congress! I’m proud to say that a lot has happened in that short time. After all, I promised to GET THINGS DONE in Washington. Just like you, I’m juggling a lot right now, but I’m determined to get real results for South Carolina. Here are just a few big things I’ve accomplished in the first 100 days:
* **Protecting Veterans:** I introduced the Veterans’ Cyber Risk Awareness Act on April 1 - to increase cyber safety among vets who are increasingly vulnerable online in these times.
* **Defending Single Parents:** I feel the pain. I know the struggle. That's why I formed the ‘Single Parents’ caucus in Congress to represent the hardworking parents that often go unrecognized.
* **Demanded Criminal Justice Reform:** The "First Step" Act is just that - a first step! It's time to improve our due process and push forward to the NEXT STEP of reforming our criminal justice system.

And friend, it’s only the beginning. **I know there’s a lot that Congress needs to tackle — and I’m determined to stay on track, roll up my sleeves, and get down to business.** And as we head into the next 100 days I want to check in with you: what do you want to make a top priority moving forward?
**[Will you let me know by taking our quick 5-second survey?](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=f32fe13685894a72b593735755478bb7&_e=zTo-5D2YvdbDPbU5VQY69y6GwA0B75l2KB3Goh0IGy2rZ5dSguibtl0W06JGu9kG_gfCuSjUP5bxL9bv8ye-lRrYjhkPTktKPzEuaJw6GaXi7WhjKZIy-Itz1mMqwjGr29gDr9hIK3OXypHfXnQaWeRAu6UAOIndf9EN_pH-O0Pfcvb43D2T28P8NaNmP4XlT77J92Tn775rCAGYbGx4KwG6tbv_nmu6nShINOuLfGSKGpVWzRmz8TovrzXrdouSB2kkvn8bhYBKjvfd8lqWqzZP81ZDCmpMilf_01IPalfgicBbB_hSTBc5QusKZKQW5-CRaKqy4c4e6WK68FaYfNN0Nu1xAsOFbJaDZ7BiNCuZdnMjR6BpuzHyHdJpue5EdxbH3lBNY3k9HKIlcRQ04UOUz5HacR4qpoTx9OJpPUqi99qfCeZROL3QGLv_PlirnWdpgLHLrFm0GCwGWeVAHoIn6wcuwZfVL8mvOct9UT8%3D)** [**YES: WEIGH IN NOW >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=f32fe13685894a72b593735755478bb7&_e=zTo-5D2YvdbDPbU5VQY69y6GwA0B75l2KB3Goh0IGy2rZ5dSguibtl0W06JGu9kG_gfCuSjUP5bxL9bv8ye-lRrYjhkPTktKPzEuaJw6GaXi7WhjKZIy-Itz1mMqwjGr29gDr9hIK3OXypHfXnQaWeRAu6UAOIndf9EN_pH-O0Pfcvb43D2T28P8NaNmP4XlT77J92Tn775rCAGYbGx4KwG6tbv_nmu6nShINOuLfGSKGpVWzRmz8TovrzXrdouSB2kkvn8bhYBKjvfd8lqWq8h-3LupdwrOGxIis5xgQG1-rxJgQvx3yy6zlO6y0wSSZFtJOk_NnrNKPVFnDE6_rfCGZYObnnsl8leeRurwd-IQRIgZ3C_az_qiKAhIOzOESSzmmZB-8S7GaqmrnenpDQwfiFLN6Zzq-Yog_Uw6euKVL9otqsMn9mGMHo_OB765x8RqlxkstQyYJNbxES7xO_0Y9kystd5aoUYA8bLi3Bk%3D) I want my focus to be on the issues that matter most to our families, workers, and small businesses. As a single mom and a businesswoman myself, I understand the struggles we’re facing today and I know we’ve all had enough of the business as usual politics in Washington. If you’re ready for a Washington that works FOR YOU, I hope you’ll let me know where you stand by taking our quick priorities survey today: **[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/survey-144421/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=f32fe13685894a72b593735755478bb7&_e=zTo-5D2YvdbDPbU5VQY69y6GwA0B75l2KB3Goh0IGy2rZ5dSguibtl0W06JGu9kG_gfCuSjUP5bxL9bv8ye-lRrYjhkPTktKPzEuaJw6GaXi7WhjKZIy-Itz1mMqwjGr29gDr9hIK3OXypHfXnQaWeRAu6UAOIndf9EN_pH-O0Pfcvb43D2T28P8NaNmP4XlT77J92Tn775rCAGYbGx4KwG6tbv_nmu6nShINOuLfGSKGpVWzRmz8TovrzXrdouSB2kkvn8bhYBKjvfd8lqWqzsPomwa5yZutLC6h3iJusAAEF3KrP6BBAj_0xVmCTrpHqarOIPqjzryUbNhSDY-5EdCRDxwCOZizQ_kWg6sCD3po3O9dt4bg-gcojstu8pTnr5kZbcwcvElaUnC2ox-VT0XxN2uI7NS7l0UWZO-74YQGiDdefi9pbsjmc4lz0qwUyEu4FLl6erSmJen5MG0i2S7C8Kgk1m8hNMsN6I6L_Y%3D)** Thank you for an amazing 100 days in Congress! I look forward to the rest. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=f32fe13685894a72b593735755478bb7&_e=zTo-5D2YvdbDPbU5VQY69y6GwA0B75l2KB3Goh0IGy2rZ5dSguibtl0W06JGu9kG_gfCuSjUP5bxL9bv8ye-lRrYjhkPTktKPzEuaJw6GaXi7WhjKZIy-Itz1mMqwjGr29gDr9hIK3OXypHfXnQaWeRAu6UAOIndf9EN_pH-O0Pfcvb43D2T28P8NaNmP4XlT77J92Tn775rCAGYbGx4KwG6tbv_nmu6nShINOuLfGSKGpVWzRmz8TovrzXrdouSB2kkvn8bhYBKjvfd8lqWq6Ld7WanlWXNVEuJqv0smreYNgKG0yJfVZ6kzSB3QusATtx7JnsttUtI3mKVHFSwl6h0sDg5SySsKP_C1cORjp3AL-FAbP9qccyI0VsHaqxYI5hZaOWEpHKtt2NbA5g34k0S6H2yKR459L41qSeeJeTky39VHQlThDwhvISDpq3M9kyYWq9ogKM3ZFEZPc3BO7b8B8azlb9OdF2C8fmLfTk%3D) Nancy Mace |

Date: Sun, Apr 18, 2021
Subject: This isn't offered to everyone...

__
---

Friend,

It's Marco Rubio here and I wanted to follow up on the news from last week.

I was incredibly humbled and proud to have been endorsed by President Trump for re-election. I know it seems like the election is a while away but the battle for the Senate has already started and is proving to be tough.

It is for these exact reasons that we decided to reopen our Founding Member Campaign last week, **but we have only 97 spots left.**

---
| | [BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER TODAY >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016nRRbuXsm_s7M3No1fvvBtQzy1YOko4ZOlts5YIQFJDMKwbDl_iuekvS-nO9D2v-ZJzsVzCFkFOc-9bIETfZDhhMJ1AsVm-D_g97slJAPMRjc1KOz7NFSoFjnj7rMACQOjsg3BotWifNkKbwJI9uufUdqJ2embf2yV5wzZUv5Q3bL9Az6uNzuhV8Kt1d65W4c_iPCYGkMZy2txegx4WItcVPB4r6Ktdt3GAn8VlAWH_Cm_WsHWZBKI5VG7sRt19vBr3z80E1EbE5V5bpW-VHHz__Ec1BI8QGQ57lwEEqKW-F5BZbrPJ-vvkzmEmNFNAY0QP-LbHQyMAUvsiivg5cpkyN7d-INjDLZ0R7zmw2TkgSmJR6lbosP7kAG9qqtn9T0lfHqV7oZOeodR6kEPWZ3Xh3iuECJiSmtq89qfMQ6pWiRg-D-2aIgg==&c=Jyegh__85mOspyiajzgYUzAcj_GpNJHnvFfC_u0afMU3cwmbXTXTUw==&ch=2CFEYTtIz08STNg8ZP9jCRhyAlNBM5VIFoEGfUSjwiyDrFVIZwXgqw== "BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER TODAY >>")
---

I know that with the Trump Endorsement, I will be seeing more attacks from the Democrats. A pro-abortion group announced I've been put "on notice" almost immediately after the endorsement. Whether it be online, in the media, or even sending Kamala Harris to Florida, Democrats have already started laying the groundwork to defeat me.

This is what I am facing, Friend.

While it won't be easy, I am not going to bend to the whims of cancel culture and the woke liberal media. I believe that with Trump's Endorsement, my campaign is stronger, but it will energize the Democrats, too.

With all of that being said, I wanted to personally thank you for being one of my top supporters and ask if you would consider becoming a Founding Member of my campaign. I need more people like you, Friend, on my team. Your support makes my team that much stronger in the face of attacks by the Democrats.

We don't have an easy road ahead, Friend, but I know that I can do this with you on my team. Please join today, we only have a few spots left, and this will be one of the last times we make this offer.

Thank you,

clean_body: "It's Mark here from Team Marco, and I was reviewing our list of Founding Members. We noticed that your name is not on our list." | | | | Friend, It's Mark here from Team Marco, and I was reviewing our list of Founding Members. We noticed that your name is not on our list. We are only keeping this offer open for a bit longer. == "We are down to only 26 open spots, %%=v\(@sFirstName\=%%.") We figured that maybe you missed Marco's email from earlier in the week. We are forwarding it to you now just so you don't miss out on this exclusive offer for Marco's top supporters. Thank you for standing with Marco, Mark Campaign Manager Rubio for Senate | | == "BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER TODAY!" Begin Forwarded Message: From: Marco Rubio <== "info@marcorubiofl.com" > Date: Sun, Apr 18, 2021 Subject: This isn't offered to everyone... Friend, It's Marco Rubio here and I wanted to follow up on the news from last week. I was incredibly humbled and proud to have been endorsed by President Trump for re-election. I know it seems like the election is a while away but the battle for the Senate has already started and is proving to be tough. It is for these exact reasons that we decided to reopen our Founding Member Campaign last week, but we have only 97 spots left.** | | == "BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER TODAY >>" I know that with the Trump Endorsement, I will be seeing more attacks from the Democrats. A pro-abortion group announced I've been put "on notice" almost immediately after the endorsement. Whether it be online, in the media, or even sending Kamala Harris to Florida, Democrats have already started laying the groundwork to defeat me. This is what I am facing, Friend. While it won't be easy, I am not going to bend to the whims of cancel culture and the woke liberal media. I believe that with Trump's Endorsement, my campaign is stronger, but it will energize the Democrats, too. With all of that being said, I wanted to personally thank you for being one of my top supporters and ask if you would consider becoming a Founding Member of my campaign. I need more people like you, Friend, on my team. Your support makes my team that much stronger in the face of attacks by the Democrats. We don't have an easy road ahead, Friend, but I know that I can do this with you on my team. Please join today, we only have a few spots left, and this will be one of the last times we make this offer. Thank you, Marco Rubio | | == "BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER TODAY" | == | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Karen Carter Peterson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Here’s why your support today is so important:
#

Last week, I launched Policy is Personal PAC to build progressive power by electing more leaders who will pursue bold policy solutions in Washington. Today, I’m proud to share with you why **I’m endorsing Karen Carter Peterson in Louisiana’s 2nd Congressional District.**
**[Karen’s special election is on Saturday (yes,_this_ weekend!), so we have no time to waste. Please split a donation between our campaigns today. Anything you can afford to give will immediately be put to use to help Karen win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27905396/281552861/-1210557456?refcode2=27d4973d-49a1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210419-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q0OTczZC00OWExLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRHsx4fEwWfEoSRqwBuOuFArez3tL2AfSQAVwsEoK_I=)**
As a State Senator, Karen has led on fights to expand health care to more than 600,000 Louisianans, meaningfully reform our deeply broken criminal legal system, and stop attacks on reproductive freedom.
She is the only candidate in her race who supports Medicare For All and a Green New Deal. Karen isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs, so she relies on grassroots supporters like you and me donating whatever we can afford.
And one more important thing to note: Karen would be the _first_ Black woman elected to federal office from Louisiana. Our movement has already made history, and now we have the opportunity to do it again.
**[Please, could you split a donation between our campaigns today to help support efforts to get out the vote ahead of Saturday’s special election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27905397/281552862/-1210557456?refcode2=27d4973d-49a1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210419-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q0OTczZC00OWExLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRHsx4fEwWfEoSRqwBuOuFArez3tL2AfSQAVwsEoK_I=)**
Thank you so much for your support. I need Karen in Washington fighting alongside me.
Onward,
Mondaire

name: Giffords.org
subject: New poll shows majority of Americans support safer gun laws
body:
#

Friends, take a look at this:
**_April 15, 2021:_
Majority Support Stricter Gun Laws, Quinnipiac University National Poll Finds**
The American people have spoken.
A new Quinnipiac University poll released reveals that a majority of Americans -- 54% -- support stricter gun laws. Even better, nearly 90% of Americans support requiring background checks for all gun purchases.
We're doing everything we can to pass background checks, but we still need the Senate to bring this legislation to the floor for a vote. And that means we need you to speak up and make your voice heard.
**Every second matters when lives are at stake, so we 're asking: **
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving background checks legislation that is waiting in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade45/1264812181/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210419-1-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade46/1264812181/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210419-1-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade59/1264812181/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210419-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade58/1264812181/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210419-1-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade5b/1264812181/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210419-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade5a/1264812181/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210419-1-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade47/1264812181/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210419-1-full")
---|---
We are hopeful that the Senate will bring this legislation to the floor for a vote soon, and it's so important that in the meantime you make your voice heard.
Each and every donation is evidence to Congress that the American people want action on gun safety right now.
Every single one of our supporters makes it more possible that background checks will finally be signed into law. We couldn't do this without you.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee158/78fba3aa/63bdd05a/50aade45/1264812181/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210419-1-full")**
**_P.S. If you aren 't able to make a donation but would still like to get involved, you can text UNIVERSAL to 34131 to get connected with your senators today!_**

body:
Liberals in D.C. are planning to add four new justices
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H71Gvnlo3VCQtFu1aDs8AIIfCWpipH0N93TnZnvocDlAgTf-K0HPfZ9lAHl90yeK1Sm2s7na0PcQDyB0sEa6hrvIDq1KbK0fbBxMla8Zop3Lt4yGPm5sJs6XSWjGeI-AwemTverurN3l5nTUX7jyAjPSFEOKpCWmfUzUGQW6hDRoqTzbsu7qsCCiCWTp_-K8k1a9AwHPVRI=&c=IIGhaiFUptzQ33X5EpmgSPKib9l0rk1AWdn7d4QfgYEXqfzrSAH9QQ==&ch=rSWASGX-omQNbbNp-jI6b78TPtRM0F_fnv6uXzlelAZFQrB6YLyKdg==&jrc=1)

| Patriot,
The Biden Administration is preparing to pack the Supreme Court. They recently launched a commission to study expanding the amount of Supreme Court justices. Just last week, they went even further and formally launched legislation to add FOUR new justices.
President Biden promised not to politicize the court and now he's going back on his word. This is a grave mistake that will break the public's trust in our rule of law.
[What are your thoughts on packing the U.S. Supreme Court?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H71Gvnlo3VCQtFu1aDs8AIIfCWpipH0N93TnZnvocDlAgTf-K0HPfZ9lAHl90yeK_NHErvvaCiXK2hNwmdz8AaXNZ7jLWbzVEe9BdmOH6mt90aOUFEjBs-DfKikAN_va-rkT_CYRsoNCQlkW-nEEUYR_Odyx_xHlKzCKVVfoLdaLUkcI1f3JIvuL0ogQA1ICw81UjcqBTMA=&c=IIGhaiFUptzQ33X5EpmgSPKib9l0rk1AWdn7d4QfgYEXqfzrSAH9QQ==&ch=rSWASGX-omQNbbNp-jI6b78TPtRM0F_fnv6uXzlelAZFQrB6YLyKdg==&jrc=1)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. clean_body: \-- and that includes my friend, Nicole Malliotakis. | | | Friend, Republican women broke history in 2020. This year, I was proud to see 18 new GOP women sworn in to serve in the 117th Congress\-- and that includes my friend, Nicole Malliotakis. | | Nicole is a former state assemblywoman and a proven conservative leader. In her time in state government, she has proven to be one of the most effective leaders by serving as Minority Whip and the ranking minority member of the Assembly Committee on Governmental Employees. | | As a new member of Congress, she has already taken charge by being a part of the ‘Freedom Force’ to fight back against the Democratic’s push for socialism. She’s pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, and supports TOUGH immigration policies. Nicole and I were just on Fox News together discussing how Joe Biden and Kamala Harris entirely ignored the humanitarian and national security crisis they have created. | | | Just like me, Nicole has a target on her back that Nancy Pelosi has painted. Next year, Pelosi will be coming back for vengeance and try to FLIP NY-11 back to blue! Pelosi and the radical liberals spent millions of dollars to keep Nicole out of office, and she’ll come back even stronger this time. "Can you chip in $15 to support Nicole against Pelosi’s attacks?" | | | | | | | | We need your support right now, Nicole is counting on us to . Thank you, Ann Wagner | Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress PO Box 50 Ballwin, MO 63022 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots who take on the Swamp, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f271d62060&e=ba6e67b849)!

**We want America First patriots in Congress. Patriots who, like President Trump, will fight the Marxists and never give up on America.**

One of the Swampers who hates President Trump and does not stand up for America is Liz Cheney.

It seems like every day, she finds a new way to go on CNN or MSNBC and dunk on Republicans. Liz Cheny is VILE!
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=83727720d2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Liz Cheney went on FOX and shredded Trump again last week.

_“If Donald Trump were the 2024 nominee, would you support him?” Cavuto asked. “I would not,” Cheney replied without hesitation.

Cheney has been vocal about her belief that Trump played a large role in causing the Capitol insurrection on January 6, one of the few Republicans to do so, and voted to impeach him because of it. On Wednesday, Cheney doubled down._

_“I’ve been very clear about my views of what happened on January 6, about my views of the president’s culpability,” Cheney said. “I obviously voted to impeach him. I think that it was the gravest violation of an oath of office by any president in American history, and I’m gonna continue to make sure people understand that.”

Trump has slammed Cheney, along with any other Republican who shares her beliefs, and Wednesday was no different. In a statement following the interview, Trump called Cheney “crazy” and said he’d “soon” endorse a primary challenger._

Liz Cheney IS crazy. She hates America and is only in politics for personal benefit. Trump will soon endorse a primary opponent to replace her in 2022; we have to follow his lead!

**We need to change Congress, and the Republicans we send there must be fighters!**

[We are not woke corporate elites. We depend on you to help us put patriots in a place to succeed!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=91f2aab9b5&e=ba6e67b849)

In fact, in over 40 states, Republican lawmakers have crafted legislation that would dramatically change how Americans make their voices heard in future elections. Some proposals even grant Republican-controlled state legislatures the ability to overturn election results—something Trump tried to coerce Congress into doing after he lost in 2020. **We can’t let them get away with this—and we’re not going to sit back and let them overturn the election right here in MA-06.[ Will you rush a contribution to help us fight back right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27910568/281572292/2005830277?refcode=20210419_TM_lawsuit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFhMjBiYi01YWExLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTgs4MVxkIQ5U6wLjXM2Itj-huAaspKy_pd9sCaA0EY=)** [CHIP IN >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27910569/281572293/1866411932?refcode=20210419_TM_lawsuit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFhMjBiYi01YWExLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTgs4MVxkIQ5U6wLjXM2Itj-huAaspKy_pd9sCaA0EY=) We should be working to make it easier for all Americans to vote—not harder. clean_body: | | | = Friend, Five Massachusetts Republican candidates are trying to overturn Seth’s election in Massachusetts’ 6th district by clinging to the same “big lie” pushed by Donald Trump and his far-right supporters. They’ve filed a lawsuit to overturn the 2020 election results and ban mail-in and early voting. A national push by the GOP to eliminate mail-in and early voting is in full swing. In fact, in over 40 states, Republican lawmakers have crafted legislation that would dramatically change how Americans make their voices heard in future elections. Some proposals even grant Republican-controlled state legislatures the ability to overturn election results—something Trump tried to coerce Congress into doing after he lost in 2020. We can’t let them get away with this—and we’re not going to sit back and let them overturn the election right here in MA-06.= = We should be working to make it easier for all Americans to vote—not harder. Thanks for helping us respond to this outrageous attempt to subvert the democratic process. name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Joe Biden wants to strip you of your RIGHT TO SELF DEFENSE!
body:
Biden wants you to have forced mental health exams to buy a gun or ammo & shred the 2nd Amendment to the Constitution. Will you help me stop it? | | | **It's happening as predicted. The Democrats are attacking our 2nd Amendment right to bear arms! It’s the second prong after taking away our free speech to the radical Left having total control.**
---
| Dear Patriot,

**_Last week_** Joe Biden announced his plans to use a flurry of executive orders to implement gun control and take away American's 2nd Amendment rights.

Joe Biden thinks he can simply shred your rights like paper by the stroke of a pen. And as someone who has already had their Second Amendment rights taken away, I’m running for US Congress to make sure what has happened to me doesn’t happen to you, and I need your [support](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=74d32feb31&e=4d7c0901a7).
---
| |
---
Joe Biden mentioned three different mass shootings during his speech about gun control: 1) Pulse Night Club 2) Sandy Hook and 3) Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School.

---
| As many of you recall, the 49 Americans who lose their lives in Orlando, FL at Pulse Nightclub didn’t lose their lives due to gun laws. The shooting was an ISIS terrorist attack carried out by Omar Mateen, a security guard who had pledged allegiance to ISIS.

Stricter gun laws wouldn’t have prevented the Pulse Night Club shooting, but that’s not stopping Joe Biden from misrepresenting the facts as he and his radical Left-wing friends attempt to use any incident in the mainstream news as a way to "Get Your Guns". **[Donate](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=d1a1719ab7&e=4d7c0901a7)** today to help me get to Congress.

---
| |
---
This year I broke the news that shortly after I confronted prior FBI director James Comey at his book signing, my name was placed on a secret "no buy" list without **_ANY_** justification. **As an investigative journalist and candidate for US Congress, I have received death threats from Antifa, Islamic Terrorists, and the Radical Left who have come to my home, vandalized my car and I now have NO way to protect myself because I have been wrongfully banned from owning, purchasing, or possessing a firearm in Joe Biden's America! And you could be next!**
---
| Attempts have been made throughout history to establish totalitarian regimes, and the first steps are to ban people from speaking out, followed by banning them from defending themselves, their property, and their rights by taking guns away from the people. What has happened to me is a _foreshadow of what the Democrats plan to do to all American's_. **I will fight for you in DC, and together we can ****[Save America](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=435aac8336&e=4d7c0901a7) and the Second Amendment. **

The Radical Left and Joe Biden Via Executive Orders plan to:
\- Ban Legally owned "Assault Weapons"
\- Create More Red Flag Laws For Gun Confiscation
\- Ban online sales of guns and ammunition
\- Create a mandated registry for all firearms and _ammunition_ in America
- _Force "Mental Health" exams_ in order to buy a gun or ammo!
\- Ban extended magazines
\- Impose a national Ammo registry so the government knows how much ammo you have

I need your support to get to Congress to ensure that Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats, including Nancy Pelosi and my opponent Lois Frankel are not successful in their mission to ultimately ban private gun ownership. I was the first federal political candidate in US history to be banned from social media, and in turn the FBI has also put me on a “no buy” list, banning me from owning a gun to defend myself. As I have been warning and fighting for years, I may have been first, but you will be next unless the Democrats are stopped. This is a prophecy we cannot allow to manifest into reality.
---
| |
---
| Can I count on you to contribute [$25](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=c302656ded&e=4d7c0901a7), [$50](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=a556b7a03a&e=4d7c0901a7), [$100](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=7cd236ba0e&e=4d7c0901a7), or a max donation of [$2,900](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=7f13529784&e=4d7c0901a7) today to help my campaign hit our second quarter goal?
---
| [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=0042453f5f&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
|
---
| Thank you so much for your support!

Truthfully
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 All rights reserved._

Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.
720 Lucerne Ave #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=3c18536019) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=3c18536019).

body:
It is recommended that you call your representative and ask that they support the For the People Act. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27911295/281574720/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYzY3NGI3LTVlYTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y8K_tt9PC2ZdccuojEm4gs0ZHHgZO7iJWmIT_CTGIdM=&emci=e8512e65-5ba1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=bdc674b7-5ea1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131) **For the People Act** Peter, Republicans across the country are restricting our access to the ballot box by passing voter suppression bills at the state level. These measures are intentionally designed by the GOP to make it harder for people to vote-- especially people of color. [**How can you fight back? You can help us elect progressive women and leaders who will fight for our right to vote in Congress by chipping in what you can today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27911296/281574721/200467634?amount=$50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYzY3NGI3LTVlYTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y8K_tt9PC2ZdccuojEm4gs0ZHHgZO7iJWmIT_CTGIdM=) Peter, 5 voter suppression bills have already been signed into law-- in Georgia, Iowa, Arkansas, and Utah. According to a report by the **[Brennan Center for Justice](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27911297/281574722/168711392?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYzY3NGI3LTVlYTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y8K_tt9PC2ZdccuojEm4gs0ZHHgZO7iJWmIT_CTGIdM=&emci=e8512e65-5ba1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=bdc674b7-5ea1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131)** , 361 bills to make it harder to vote have been introduced in 47 states in the first 3 months of this year. [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27911298/281574723/200467634?refcode=0416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYzY3NGI3LTVlYTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y8K_tt9PC2ZdccuojEm4gs0ZHHgZO7iJWmIT_CTGIdM=) Now is the time to pass the For the People Act-- the House-passed comprehensive voting rights bill. All of us are responsible to ensure that every American has the right to vote. We are doing so by funding progressive women across the country and by supporting organizations like Fair Fight. Thank you for supporting our work. **[With your help, we can stand with Stacey now, a true leader who puts protecting our right to vote at the center of her agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27911299/281574724/200467634?refcode=0416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYzY3NGI3LTVlYTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y8K_tt9PC2ZdccuojEm4gs0ZHHgZO7iJWmIT_CTGIdM=)** **-Moms in Office** [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27911300/281574725/200467634?refcode=0416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYzY3NGI3LTVlYTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y8K_tt9PC2ZdccuojEm4gs0ZHHgZO7iJWmIT_CTGIdM=) Moms in Office

subject: We all know Derek Chauvin's guilty

body:
electgrassroots.org [electgrassroots.org]There are two Americas
How police respond to Black people is very different than how they respond to whites - and that's got to change
Hi Peter,
As we wait for the jury to return a verdict in the trial of Derek Chauvin for the murder of George Floyd, we all know how it should come out - we watched the video, as difficult as it was. We must reform how policing works in this country. Help us elect candidates who support police reform and ending for-profit prisons.
