subject: BP Arrests Twice as Many Criminal Aliens in Six Months than All of Last Year
body:
As the southern border crisis worsens, the latest U.S. Border Patrol figures show the agency has arrested more than twice as many criminal migrants in the first six months of fiscal year 2021 than it did in all of 2020.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 19, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22614&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3RoZS1odW50ZXItYmlkZW4tc2NhbmRhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQxOTIxNDI0Nw==) | **[The Hunter Biden Scandals](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22614&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3RoZS1odW50ZXItYmlkZW4tc2NhbmRhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQxOTIxNDI0Nw==)** Judicial Watch is working hard to get more information on the Biden Family scandals, undertaking “the basic investigations” that Congress and the Justice Department are seemingly unwilling to do, Fitton noted Friday. Starting with Hunter Biden’s laptop, “the Justice Department refuses to do anything significant against Joe Biden despite the evidence that he’s directly implicated in his son’s racketeering.” Fitton argued that “by refusing to do anything significant relating to Hunter Biden investigation, the Justice Department, per usual, practically speaking took sides in the election fight.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22614&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3RoZS1odW50ZXItYmlkZW4tc2NhbmRhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQxOTIxNDI0Nw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22633&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcmVwYXJhdGlvbnMtcHJvZ3JhbS1ldmFuc3Rvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Records about Reparations Program in Evanston, Illinois](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22633&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcmVwYXJhdGlvbnMtcHJvZ3JhbS1ldmFuc3Rvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3)** On March 22, 2021, the Evanston City Council adopted Resolution 37-R27, authorizing the implementation of the Evanston Local Reparations Restorative Housing Program and Program Budget. The program allocated $10 million to provide $25,000 to Black/African American individuals who are either Evanston residents or direct descendants of Evanston residents to the exclusion of all other residents or direct descendants of residents. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22633&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcmVwYXJhdGlvbnMtcHJvZ3JhbS1ldmFuc3Rvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22645&F=H&) | **[BP Arrests Twice as Many Criminal Aliens in Six Months than All of Last Year](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22645&F=H&)** As the southern border crisis worsens, the latest U.S. Border Patrol figures show the agency has arrested more than twice as many criminal migrants in the first six months of fiscal year 2021 than it did in all of 2020. The fiscal year runs from October 1 to September 30 and the overwhelmed frontline agency is getting slammed with an unprecedented influx of illegal immigrants as the Biden administration extends the welcome matt. Open border groups and their allies in the administration like to portray the migrants as impoverished victims of Latin American violence desperate for a better life in the melting pot to the north. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22645&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22613&F=H&) | **[Dozens of Gitmo Captives Confirmed to Reengage in Terrorism after Release are At Large](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22613&F=H&)** Dozens of captives verified by the U.S. to reengage in terrorist activity after being released from the military prison in Guantanamo Bay are at large, a recently declassified intelligence report reveals. Recidivism among detainees freed from the compound at the U.S. Naval base in southeast Cuba—also known as Gitmo or GTMO—is nothing new and has been well documented for years by the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). In its latest disturbing update, ODNI discloses that the whereabouts of 69 former Gitmo detainees that the government is certain returned to terrorism is unknown. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22613&F=H&)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [Grassroots Rebellion Grows with New Calls to Ban Critical Race Theory from Military, Public Schools ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22547&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYW50aS1jcnQtZ3Jhc3Nyb290cy1tb3ZlbWVudC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3) The Epoch Times A few weeks after Flynn’s termination as head football coach for Dedham High School in Massachusetts, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit in federal court on his behalf, charging that the coach’s firing violated his First Amendment right to petition public officials and that it was in retaliation for his criticism of the curriculum. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22547&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYW50aS1jcnQtZ3Jhc3Nyb290cy1tb3ZlbWVudC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3)
---
### [Lawsuit: 2,400 Illegal Alien Criminals Released under San Francisco Sheriff’s Sanctuary Policy ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22646&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbGF3c3VpdC0yNDAwLWlsbGVnYWxzLXNmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTkyMTQyNDc=) Newsmax We have sued to overturn the San Francisco Sheriff’s sanctuary policy, and our suit revealed that more than 2,400 criminal illegal aliens were released under the department’s policy on communications with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about criminal illegal aliens in the Sheriff’s custody. (Cynthia Cerletti v. Vicki Hennessy, Sheriff (No. CGC-16-556164)). A hearing in the court challenge occurred on April 5. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22646&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbGF3c3VpdC0yNDAwLWlsbGVnYWxzLXNmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTkyMTQyNDc=)
---
### [Appeals Court Hearing: Pelosi/Schiff Argue Congress Can Secretly Subpoena Phone Records of Citizens ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22607&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY29uZ3Jlc3Mtc3VicG9lbmEtcGhvbmUtcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch released a transcript of the March 24 oral argument before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit challenging a lower court ruling upholding the secrecy of controversial secretly-issued congressional subpoenas for phone records by Rep. Adam Schiff, Chairman of the U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, relating to the impeachment of President Trump. The appeals court hearing came after a lower court ruling in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit, Judicial Watch v. v Adam Schiff and U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (No. 1:19-03790)), requesting subpoenas issued by the Committee on or about September 30, 2019. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53451&L=22607&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY29uZ3Jlc3Mtc3VicG9lbmEtcGhvbmUtcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDE5MjE0MjQ3)

clean_body: As the southern border crisis worsens, the latest U.S. Border Patrol figures show the agency has arrested more than twice as many criminal migrants in the first six months of fiscal year 2021 than it did in all of 2020. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 19, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Judicial Watch is working hard to get more information on the Biden Family scandals, undertaking “the basic investigations” that Congress and the Justice Department are seemingly unwilling to do, Fitton noted Friday. Starting with Hunter Biden’s laptop, “the Justice Department refuses to do anything significant against Joe Biden despite the evidence that he’s directly implicated in his son’s racketeering.” Fitton argued that “by refusing to do anything significant relating to Hunter Biden investigation, the Justice Department, per usual, practically speaking took sides in the election fight.” == ---|--- | | | | | On March 22, 2021, the Evanston City Council adopted Resolution 37-R27, authorizing the implementation of the Evanston Local Reparations Restorative Housing Program and Program Budget. The program allocated $10 million to provide $25,000 to Black/African American individuals who are either Evanston residents or direct descendants of Evanston residents to the exclusion of all other residents or direct descendants of residents. ---|--- | | | | == | == As the southern border crisis worsens, the latest U.S. Border Patrol figures show the agency has arrested more than twice as many criminal migrants in the first six months of fiscal year 2021 than it did in all of 2020. The fiscal year runs from October 1 to September 30 and the overwhelmed frontline agency is getting slammed with an unprecedented influx of illegal immigrants as the Biden administration extends the welcome matt. Open border groups and their allies in the administration like to portray the migrants as impoverished victims of Latin American violence desperate for a better life in the melting pot to the north. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Dozens of captives verified by the U.S. to reengage in terrorist activity after being released from the military prison in Guantanamo Bay are at large, a recently declassified intelligence report reveals. Recidivism among detainees freed from the compound at the U.S. Naval base in southeast Cuba—also known as Gitmo or GTMO—is nothing new and has been well documented for years by the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). In its latest disturbing update, ODNI discloses that the whereabouts of 69 former Gitmo detainees that the government is certain returned to terrorism is unknown. = ---|--- | | | The Epoch Times A few weeks after Flynn’s termination as head football coach for Dedham High School in Massachusetts, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit in federal court on his behalf, charging that the coach’s firing violated his First Amendment right to petition public officials and that it was in retaliation for his criticism of the curriculum. = Newsmax We have sued to overturn the San Francisco Sheriff’s sanctuary policy, and our suit revealed that more than 2,400 criminal illegal aliens were released under the department’s policy on communications with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about criminal illegal aliens in the Sheriff’s custody. (Cynthia Cerletti v. Vicki Hennessy, Sheriff (No. CGC-16-556164)). A hearing in the court challenge occurred on April 5. = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch released a transcript of the March 24 oral argument before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit challenging a lower court ruling upholding the secrecy of controversial secretly-issued congressional subpoenas for phone records by Rep. Adam Schiff, Chairman of the U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, relating to the impeachment of President Trump. The appeals court hearing came after a lower court ruling in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit, Judicial Watch v. v Adam Schiff and U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (No. 1:19-03790)), requesting subpoenas issued by the Committee on or about September 30, 2019. = = = = == == | CLIPS == = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Protect the Supreme Court
body:
Sign my petition now | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ab53c4be96a/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4876074?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

Last week, Democratic members from both the House and the Senate stood on the steps of the US Supreme Court to announce their legislation to **_“Pack the Court.”_**

If their legislation passes, it will add four new liberal justices to the court - just enough to give them a majority.

It is clear that the radical socialistic wing of the Democratic Party controls their party’s agenda and they want **all the levers of power!**

They have the Presidency, the Senate, the Congress and now they want the Judiciary – **_this brazen power grab is unprecedented in our nation’s history._**

This is a blatant assault on the independence of our Judiciary, our Constitution, and the rule of law.

So I joined my colleagues in introducing a constitutional amendment capping the number of justices at nine permanently - [_will you join me in protecting our constitutional rights?_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=fbab7e0623&e=13f35c4add)

[**_SIGN MY PETITION TO PROTECT OUR COURT HERE_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=3290377ac9&e=13f35c4add)

This is a fight for the future of our nation. Biden has already stated that your rights are not absolute; he's launched a court-packing commission - how long before he starts taking your rights away one by one?

[_That's why I need you in this fight with me. We need to be unified, and we need to be loud - let's protect our constitution._](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=f08245d701&e=13f35c4add)

Best,

Chris Jacobs

MEMBER OF CONGRESS
NEW YORK'S 27TH DISTRICT

name: Team AOC
subject: Before tomorrow, we have one question for you to answer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Tomorrow, Alexandria and Sen. Ed Markey will reintroduce their landmark Green New Deal resolution in Congress.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210419-2012-header&t=1&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)
This is a huge week for our movement.
Tomorrow, Alexandria and Sen. Ed Markey will reintroduce their landmark Green New Deal resolution in Congress.
In just the two years since their resolution was first introduced in Congress, the Green New Deal has gained strong momentum. It is one of the most popular policy proposals in the country with 57% of voters in favor of their congresspeople cosponsoring the resolution.1
We’ve also seen countless other bills introduced that have adopted the same approach of prioritizing jobs, justice, and climate together — like the Green New Deal for Public Housing introduced by Senator Sanders, and the Green New Deal For Cities that Rep. Cori Bush introduced today.
**You’re an important member of this movement to build support for the Green New Deal,** so as we get ready to reintroduce the resolution this week, we want to hear from you.
[What questions do you have about the Green New Deal? Your responses will help us determine what resources and information will be most helpful for our movement as we prepare for the reintroduction.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/gnd-survey/?source=em20210419-2012&t=2&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)
**[Take the one-question survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/gnd-survey/?source=em20210419-2012&t=3&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)**
**Simply put, the Green New Deal – modeled on FDR’s New Deal – is a plan for confronting our climate crisis** by creating tens of millions of good-paying, union jobs making our infrastructure sustainable and resilient to extreme weather and ensuring everyone has access to clean air and water.
Frontline communities — like coal towns, Indigenous communities, and communities of color — that have been disproportionately impacted by climate change will be prioritized both in funding and in the policy decision making process. **No one gets left behind and no one gets left out.**
But the lies and propaganda from right-wing Republicans around the Green New Deal are harmful and constant.
We will not let disinformation slow us down, which is why we need your help. Together, we can answer your most frequently asked questions and scale up our movement with the tools and knowledge to spread the truth.
[**Your responses will ensure we’re reaching voters with the information they need to help advance the Green New Deal. Please take a few minutes to share your questions with us.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/gnd-survey/?source=em20210419-2012&t=4&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)
**[Start survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/gnd-survey/?source=em20210419-2012&t=5&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)**
Thank you,
Team AOC
1 - [Data for Progress](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8593?t=6&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210419-2012-footer&t=7&refcode2=2012_2526796_AurWkC&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2012%2E2526796%2EAurWkC). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

We will not let disinformation slow us down, which is why we need your help. Together, we can answer your most frequently asked questions and scale up our movement with the tools and knowledge to spread the truth. Thank you, Team AOC 1 - | | Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
